title: [Mistwatch]
description: Tucked away from the more traveled areas, this small part of the dock juts out over the water, perpendicular to a white-veined vaalorn gate leading to a private pier.  The sturdy pilings are stained with layers of white salt.  A few warped wooden benches are secured to the floor planks, several rolls of fishing net piled to the side.
